nasb.text: Then Jesus *said to him, “Go, Satan! For it is written, ‘You shall worship the Lord your God, and serve Him only.’ ”

esv.text: Then Jesus said to him, “Be gone, Satan! For it is written, “‘You shall worship the Lord your God and     him only shall you serve.’”

cnv.text: 但耶穌說：“撒但，走開！經上記著： ‘當拜主你的　神， 單要事奉他。’”

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“撒旦，走开！圣经上说，‘要敬拜主——你的上帝，单单事奉祂。’”

csbs.text: 耶稣对他说：“撒旦，退去！因为经上记着： ‘要敬拜主——你的神， 唯独事奉他。’      ”
